rule: Do not begin a stage until the previous stage's Decisions.md justifies proceeding.
status_files_note: Per-stage status (STAGE2_STATUS.md, Stage3_Status.md) is the authoritative, kept-current detail -- this file is a coarse machine-readable index, updated at stage-transition points, not on every experiment.

stages.goal: Determine WHY class conditioning fails before touching architecture.

experiments.name: Dataset Scaling (PTB-XL only, no new data)

stages.goal: Verify Stage 1 findings, audit repository provenance, and measure (no retraining) where/why conditioning fails inside the model -- Tier 0 only. Tier 1 (actual architecture changes) is Stage 3's job, not this stage's, even though both are planned in the same Stage2_Master_Prompt.md for continuity.
Implement architecture changes justified by Stage 2 Tier 0 evidence (e.g. LayerScale-style per-block gain, cross-attention, auxiliary classifier loss), one variable changed at a time.
stages.note: Phase 0 (pre-registration + dilution/final_norm-unproj findings) complete. Candidates S3-001..S3-006 implemented and smoke-tested. GPU training of S3-001..003 (Wave 1) underway/complete; S3-004/005 (Wave 2) queued; S3-006 (Wave 3) deprioritized pending Wave 1/2 results.
